acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.text: By accessing or using this application, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you disagree with any part of these terms, you may not access or use the application.

description.title: Service Description
description.text: This application provides expense tracking tools, including transaction management, receipt storage, currency exchange tracking, and financial reporting. The service is provided 'as is' for personal or business use.

userAccounts.title: User Accounts
userAccounts.text: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You are fully responsible for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized access to your account.

userResponsibilities.title: User Responsibilities
userResponsibilities.text: You agree to provide accurate and complete information when creating your account. You are responsible for all financial data you enter into the application. You should verify the accuracy of any calculations or reports generated by the app.

prohibitedActivities.title: Prohibited Activities
prohibitedActivities.text: You may not: (1) use the app for any illegal purpose, (2) attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems, (3) upload malicious code or viruses, (4) reverse engineer or copy any part of the app, (5) share your account credentials with others, or (6) use the app to store fraudulent or false financial information.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.text: The application, its code, design, logos, and content are owned by us and protected by copyright laws. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or create derivative works without our explicit permission.

limitationOfLiability.title: Limitation of Liability
limitationOfLiability.text: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the application. This includes data loss, financial miscalculations, or service interruptions. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid to use the service (if any).

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer of Warranties
disclaimer.text: The application is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or secure. We are not responsible for financial decisions you make based on app data. You should always verify critical financial information independently.

termination.title: Termination
termination.text: We may terminate or suspend your account immediately without notice if you violate these Terms. You may delete your account at any time. Upon termination, your right to use the service ceases immediately.

governingLaw.title: Governing Law
governingLaw.text: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Cuba. Any dispute arising from these Terms shall be resolved through binding arbitration in Havana, Cuba, in accordance with Cuban arbitration rules.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.text: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will notify users of material changes via email or in-app notice. Continued use of the app after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.text: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at drios9107@gmail.com.
